title: Canopy Growth Reports Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2024 Financial Results
text: Canopy Growth achieved Q2 FY2024 net revenue of $70 million. Consolidated gross margin was 34% in Q2 FY2024, compared to negative 1% in Q2 FY2023, primarily driven by the business transformation initiatives executed since the beginning of FY2023. The company delivered additional cost reduction of $54 million in Q2 FY2024, bringing the total cost reduction to $226 million since the beginning of FY2023.
